purpose: Concrete internet-discovered free/open-source UI template sources for the frontend-components skill. These are real repositories or public template catalogs, not generic prompt ideas.
license_policy: Free-only scan. Only reuse code when a compatible free/open-source license is verified. Skip paid, Pro, premium, gated, login-required, marketplace-only, subscription-only, trial-only, and unclear-access templates/components.

templates.name: TailAdmin React Tailwind Admin Dashboard
templates.skill_usage: Use as concrete reference for admin dashboard shells, widgets, calendars, charts, tables, and settings layouts.

templates.name: Admin One React Tailwind
templates.skill_usage: Use for admin shell, sidebar, cards, tables, user-management, and internal tool layouts.

templates.name: Materio MUI Next.js Admin Template Free
templates.skill_usage: Use for Material-style admin screens, settings pages, form-heavy dashboards, and enterprise UI.

templates.name: Devias Material Kit React
templates.skill_usage: Use for Material-style website sections, account pages, profile/settings screens, and clean form layouts.

templates.name: ixartz SaaS Boilerplate
templates.skill_usage: Use as concrete SaaS structure reference for landing pages, auth, billing, dashboard shell, and production app layout.

templates.name: Horizon UI shadcn Next.js Boilerplate
templates.skill_usage: Use for shadcn-style app shell, dashboard layout, and modern Next.js SaaS UI patterns.

templates.name: Cruip Mosaic Lite Tailwind Dashboard Template
templates.license: GPL-3.0 with upstream redistribution/resale restriction note
templates.skill_usage: Use as visual/category reference only. Do not copy code into distributable skill bundles because upstream README includes redistribution/resale restrictions.

templates.name: shadcn Dashboard Landing Template
templates.license: MIT badge/README claim; LICENSE file not present in fetched repository path
templates.skill_usage: Use as free visual/category reference for combined landing + dashboard experiences. Do not copy source until an actual license file or release license is verified.

templates.name: Saleor Storefront
templates.skill_usage: Use as architecture and UX reference only. Do not import source into this skill unless license compatibility is reviewed separately.

templates.name: AI SaaS Starter Template Kit for Next.js and Tailwind CSS
templates.skill_usage: Use only the free/open-source repository version as reference for AI SaaS page structure, dashboard/auth/pricing/blog layout, and generator-style product UI. Ignore Pro-only features listed in upstream comparison tables.

templates.name: Studio Admin Next.js Shadcn Dashboard
templates.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 + shadcn/ui + Framer Motion
templates.skill_usage: Use for modern shadcn admin shells with collapsible sidebars, multiple dashboard variants, auth screens, theme presets, feature colocation, and future RBAC/user-management screen planning.

templates.name: Shadcn Fintech Dashboard
templates.skill_usage: Use as a concrete reference for high-interaction dashboard pages: searchable transactions, settings/security/billing tabs, analytics charts, notifications, draggable widgets, and rich card-based financial UX.

templates.name: Next.js 14 Supabase Dashboard
templates.skill_usage: Use for Supabase-auth dashboard structure, App Router layouts, Prisma-backed data screens, route organization, and secure server-action oriented admin UI patterns.

templates.name: Kiranism Next Shadcn Dashboard Starter
templates.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 + shadcn/ui + tweakcn themes
templates.skill_usage: Use as a concrete modern SaaS dashboard reference with app router folders, sidebar/header layout, React Query data tables, Clerk-style auth/workspaces, billing pages, kanban, chat, notifications, and multi-theme shadcn UI patterns.

templates.name: TailAdmin Free Next.js Admin Dashboard
templates.skill_usage: Use only the free repository/demo version for Next.js admin shells, dashboard widgets, sidebar/navigation, auth forms, charts, data tables, profile/error pages, and dark-mode dashboard layout patterns. Ignore Pro-only dashboard variants and components.

templates.name: Horizon UI Tailwind React Admin Dashboard
templates.skill_usage: Use the free MIT React/Tailwind version as a reference for polished dashboard cards, profile/auth/example pages, component gallery structure, and modern rounded card-heavy admin UI. Ignore Horizon Pro assets.
